d: Eironn combines the power of two swords and selects a tile, pulling in enemies within 2 tiles to the center. Then causes an explosion after a short delay, dealing [[250%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within 2 tiles and [[immobilizing]] them for [[3]]s. Eironn prioritizes selecting a tile with the most surrounding enemies.
Increases damage to [[270%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[290%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[310%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[330%]]<ATK>.

Eironn slashes to deal [[110%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within a 3-tile arc and reduces their Haste by [[50]] for [[5]]s. Later, Eironn stabs the target, dealing [[220%]]<ATK> damage to the target and enemies in a 2-tile line behind them, reducing their Magic DEF by [[40%]] for [[5]]s.
Increases slash damage to [[115%]]<ATK> and stab damage to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases slash damage to [[120%]]<ATK> and stab damage to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases slash damage to [[125%]]<ATK> and stab damage to [[250%]]<ATK>.
Eironn gains a shield that blocks [[280%]]<ATK> damage for [[10]]s. Additionally, he gains [[50%]] [[dodge chance]] while the shield is active.
Increases shield value to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Increases shield value to [[320%]]<ATK>.
Increases [[dodge chance]] to [[80%]].
Eironn increases his Ranged DEF by [[15]] during battle. He gains an extra [[7]] Ranged DEF when his HP drops below [[50%]] .
Eironn increases his Ranged DEF by [[19]] during battle. He gains an extra [[9]] Ranged DEF when his HP drops below [[50%]] .
Eironn increases his Ranged DEF by [[23]] during battle. He gains an extra [[12]] Ranged DEF when his HP drops below [[50%]] .
Eironn casts Verdant Cyclone for the first time in each battle without consuming Energy, but the damage is reduced to [[50%]] of the original.
Reduces damage to [[70%]] of the original.
Increases immobilize duration to [[6]]s.
Reduces damage to [[80%]] of the original.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, gains [[15]] Penetration and [[15]] Haste for [[5]]s when a battle starts and when [[assisting or defeating]] an enemy.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 16 DEF Penetration, 10 Execution.

d: Eironn reduces an extra [[15%]] Magic DEF on an [[immobilized]] target if they are [[immobilized]] by Verdant Cyclone.
